ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PROGRAM MANAGEMENT, SYSTEM INTEGRATION, SUSTAINMENT, TRAINER/TRAINING, AND CONTRACTOR SUPPLIED PARTS WHICH INCLUDES SERVICES AND SUPPLIES APPLICABLE TO THE JOINT SURVEILLANCE TARGET ATTACK RADAR SYSTEM (JOINT STARS)(THIS ITEM INCLUDES ALL TRAVEL/PER DIEM)
